title: JBCスプリントの後に・ライバル！

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I... did it! Yippeeee! Hooraaaay!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: First place! Trainer! I got first!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She placed first in a genuine G1 race, and by
doing so, she's shed all doubts about her own
abilities.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hey, does this mean I can enter the Arima Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'm ready for it, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks a little uneasy. It seems like she finally
understands just how important the Arima Kinen
is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In that case, the only thing I can say is...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Around me?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text:
Haru Uraraaaa! Congratulations! Great work! You
were amazing!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Didn't you say you wanted to take on the Arima
Kinen? I'll be rooting for you!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: What a great race! You have my vote!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow! They're all cheering... for me!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: That means... I'm ready, right?!
choice_data_list: Yup, let's get you into the Arima Kinen!
Yup, let's get you into the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her fans' cheers continue on for quite a while.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way home, I see Haru Urara off at her
dorm.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Welcome back, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Congrats on getting first place!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow! Spe! Sei! Heehee. Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah! U-um...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: You two are gonna enter the Arima Kinen, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Of course we're entering. And of course, I plan on
winning.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Well, I wanna win it too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So that makes us...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yep! We're rivals!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah! That's right! Rivals!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both of them are looking straight at Haru Urara
with serious eyes.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You two better watch out! I'm gonna win and take
first place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's decided! She's running in the Arima Kinen!
